name: Bev & Lou Castellano

statedReqs.notes: Sold a restaurant chain. Want 'the lake house people mean when they say lake house.'

hiddenPrefs.desc: Lou can't swim. The dock is for show; a great deck and sunset view outrank actual water access.
Bev will walk from anything with septic problems — she ran restaurants; she knows what that smell costs.

intro: Cheerfully loaded, gloriously indecisive. Every showing ends with 'we love it!' and no offer. Yet.
